harnesses.property: encode→decode roundtrip identity for all u64
encoding always uses minimal byte count
decode never panics on arbitrary 9-byte input
block_subsidy never panics for any (height, already_generated)
parse_tx never panics on arbitrary 13-byte input (header prefix)
retarget_v1 never panics for bounded target/timestamps
harnesses.reason: BigUint arbitrary-precision arithmetic generates SAT formula too large for CBMC; covered by fuzz target retarget_no_panic, unit tests, and Lean4 retarget_proved
BigUint generates SAT formula consuming ~21 min on GitHub Actions; covered by fuzz target biguint_roundtrip and unit tests

kani.removed_harnesses_note: SHA3 and BigUint harnesses replaced by cargo-fuzz targets in clients/rust/fuzz/

targets.name: merkle_determinism

targets.name: retarget_no_panic
targets.property: retarget_v1 determinism plus exact clamp/range invariants for arbitrary target/timestamps

targets.property: BigUint to bytes32 roundtrip identity for values <= 2^256

targets.name: pow_check
targets.property: pow_check determinism plus exact target-range and strict block_hash < target semantics for arbitrary 80-byte header + 32-byte target

targets.name: compact_shortid
targets.property: compact_shortid determinism for arbitrary wtxid + nonces

targets.name: parse_htlc
targets.property: parse_htlc_covenant_data determinism plus post-parse HTLC invariants (valid lock_mode, positive lock_value, distinct claim/refund keys)

targets.name: parse_vault
targets.property: parse_vault_covenant_data determinism plus canonical vault invariants (threshold/key_count bounds, exact length, sorted unique keys/whitelist, owner exclusion)

targets.name: FuzzMempoolFeeWeightOrdering
targets.property: Mempool fee/weight ordering matches checked cross-multiplication oracle; eviction tiers remain fee/weight, absolute fee, admission_seq, source-neutral

targets.name: FuzzMempoolRollingFloorBoundaries
targets.property: Rolling fee floor clamps to the default, overflows fail closed, non-divisible entry floor uses floor division, and min-fee-step raise saturates

targets.name: FuzzDaFeeFloorPolicyBoundaries
targets.property: DA Stage C required fee uses checked relay/DA/surcharge arithmetic with exact accept, floor-1 reject, overflow class, and non-DA short-circuit assertions

fuzz.reason: Committed Go fuzz/property targets are listed in go_fuzz.targets; edge-domain fuzz coverage remains deferred because the edge-pack checker intentionally does not validate concrete fuzz evidence claims yet.

formal.reason: No formal theorem/proof bridge is added or claimed for mempool_policy here.
